scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to spawn a PTY session for an interactive command
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill provides spawn() API signature with IPtyForkOptions, lazy-loading pattern, and event subscription example
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent retrieves correct spawn() call signature and lazy-load import pattern from SKILL.md or references/api/pty-api.md

scenarios.scenario: Agent encounters memory leak from undisposed PTY event handlers
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's anti-pattern table identifies the dispose requirement and shows correct finally-block cleanup pattern
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent finds anti-pattern #2 (Forgetting to .dispose()) and applies correct pattern within 2 lookups

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to decide between bun-pty and Bun.spawn() for a simple command execution
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's decision tree correctly routes: fire-and-forget → Bun.spawn(), interactive → PTY via spawn()
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent follows decision tree and selects correct tooling based on use case described in the prompt
